title: Car Class
description: Create a Car class with attributes and a method to display information.
problemStatement:
Object-Oriented Programming starts here! Create a `Car` class with:
- Public strings `brand` and `model`.
- A public method `void drive()` that prints `"The [brand] [model] is driving!"`.

**Requirement:** Instantiate the class in `main` with `"Tesla", "Model S"` and call `drive()`.
hints: Don't forget the semicolon after the class definition `};`.
expectedOutput: The Tesla Model S is driving!
